system.description:
A rage that burns so fiercely, it calls forth flames to ravage its enemies.

LEVEL 3

Stoke the Flames. (1/turn) While Raging, after you crit or kill an enemy, gain 1 Fury Die.

Overflowing Fury. (Reach 4) When discarding Fury Dice over your max, deal fire damage to a creature equal to the value of that die; they gain Smoldering.

LEVEL 7

Hot Headed. Whenever you roll initiative, gain STR Fury Dice. Your Overflowing Fury deals the max value of the die.

LEVEL 11

EXPLOSION! Smoldering creatures suffer +LVL damage from Overflowing Fury, ending the condition. You may deal that much damage to ALL creatures adjacent to your target.

LEVEL 15

Pyromania. Double the Reach and damage of your Overflowing Fury.
